name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade
directions: In a small bowl, combine all the ingredients (except the steaks).  Set aside 3/4 cup for basting later.
Pour remaining marinade into a large resealable bag and add the steaks. Seal bag and turn to coat; refrigerate for a minimum of 15 minutes (mine stayed in over four hours).
Drain and discard the marinade.  Grill steaks over medium heat for 6 minutes on each side until meat reaches your desired temperature (medium is 160F); basting with reserved marinade as you grill.

name: Rich Garden Tomato Soup
directions: In a large kettle, heat butter and oil over med-high heat.  Add onions and seasonings, cooking until soft.  Add tomatoes and paste.  Simmer 10 minute.
Place flour in small mixing bowl, whisk in ¼ Celsius broth.  Stir into tomato mixture.  Add remaining broth.  Simmer at least 30 min., stirring frequently.

Allow mixture to cool and run through food processor or use immersion blender.  Return pureed mixture to the kettle.  Add sugar and cream.  Taste to adjust sweetness and seasoning.  Heat through, stirring occasionally.

similar.name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade

name: Cucumber Rounds With Salmon Topping
directions: Peel cucumbers and cut into 1/2" slices. Using a melon baller, cut out the center of each cucumber slice, being sure to leave bottom of slice intact.
Combine salmon, sour cream, dill, lemon juice and capers in a small bowl and stir until well blended. Cover and chill 2 hours to allow flavors to blend.

similar.name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade

name: Super Simple Strawberry Salad
directions: In a small saucepan over medium heat, add sesame seeds and sauté until lightly golden brown, about 5 minutes, stirring and tossing constantly. Remove from the heat and set aside.

In a small bowl, combine white vinegar, champagne vinegar, olive oil, balsamic, sugar, poppy seeds, paprika, Worcestershire sauce, red onions, sesame seeds and freshly black pepper; whisk together until sugar dissolved. Cover and chill for 1 hour. Toast almonds and set aside.
In a large bowl, toss spinach leaves, strawberries, and almonds. Pour dressing over salad and toss. Sprinkle with goat cheese. Makes 4 servings.

similar.name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade

name: Spicy Tropical Salsa
directions: In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients until well-mixed. Transfer in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
Serve salsa over white fish, crab cakes or with tortilla chips.

similar.name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade

name: Cucumber Salad
directions: In a bowl, add sour cream, Miracle Whip®, dill, vinegar, sugar, salt and pepper; stir until well combined and set aside.
Using a mandolin, slice cucumber thinly and set aside. Slice onions (Lyonnaise cut) thinly and halve the slices.

In a large bowl, combine cucumbers and onion slices. Pour half of the dressing over and stir well until veggies are well coated. Slowly add more dressing until desired consistency. Cover and transfer to the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Taste of the Orient Beef Marinade
